text:
J1100A_SOB_EXRTN_CD J1100A Shortness of Breath With Exertion Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had shortness of breath with exertion (e.g., walking, bathing, transferring). -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
351 J1100B_SOB_SITG_CD J1100B_SOB_SITG_CD J1100B Shortness of Breath When Sitting Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had shortness of breath when sitting at rest. -=Not assessed/no
